title: Land Survey Preparation Checklist
subtitle: Get your property ready for a professional land survey
description: Property owners often overlook critical preparation steps before hiring a PLS surveyor. This checklist helps you gather required documents, identify boundary markers, and avoid costly delays that can push your project timeline back weeks.
bullets: Identify which documents your PLS surveyor needs upfront
Locate existing boundary markers and stakes on your property
Clear survey areas to prevent $500+ rescheduling costs
Know the 3 survey types and which fits your project

title: Land Survey Rate Guide 2026
subtitle: Benchmark 2026 pricing against local PLS surveyor rates.
description: See what property owners actually pay for boundary surveys, topographic work, and subdivisions in your state. Compare costs by survey type and understand PLS rate variations.
bullets: State-by-state breakdown of PLS surveyor hourly rates and project fees
Cost ranges for boundary, topographic, and ALTA surveys in 2026
How acreage, terrain, and complexity affect your final survey bill
Avoid surprise costs: what's typically included vs. itemized add-ons

title: Land Surveyor Vetting Guide
subtitle: Essential checklist to hire the right PLS surveyor
description: Property owners often overpay or hire unqualified surveyors. This guide reveals the specific credentials, certifications, and red flags that separate licensed professionals from costly mistakes.
bullets: Verify PLS license status in your state's regulatory database
Identify surveyors who carry errors & omissions insurance
Spot boundary disputes before they drain your budget
Compare typical survey costs: residential vs. commercial projects
